title: RIP Claude Fable, open-source AI unleashed, full body avatars, new Google models, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search channel reviews multiple AI developments including Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3, GLM 5.2, and various research projects on video, avatars, and text-to-speech. The episode covers emerging models and tools across generative AI, computer vision, and speech synthesis domains.
writeup: This AI Search news roundup surveys recent releases across generative AI, computer vision, and speech synthesis, including the Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3, and GLM 5.2 models. It also covers research projects spanning video generation, full body 3D avatars, and text-to-speech, with technical threads on sparse attention, live translation, and diffusion models. The value is breadth: a single pass over several open-source model launches and tooling developments rather than a deep dive on any one system.
